checklist.description: The route is registered as a Fastify plugin using fastify-plugin (fp), not as a plain function, consistent with all other route files in apps/rest-api/src/routes/.
checklist.name: route_registered_as_fastify_plugin

checklist.description: Request params and response body are defined using TypeBox (Type.Object, Type.String, etc.) and the route uses withTypeProvider<TypeBoxTypeProvider>().
checklist.example: const ParamsSchema = Type.Object({ agentId: Type.String() }); const ResponseSchema = Type.Object({ publicKey: Type.String(), fingerprint: Type.String() })
checklist.name: typebox_schema_used

checklist.description: When the agent does not exist, the route returns HTTP 404 using createProblem(), not 403 or a raw Error throw.
checklist.name: 404_not_403_for_missing_agent

checklist.description: All error responses use the createProblem() helper to produce RFC 9457 Problem Details format. No raw new Error() or reply.send({ error: ... }) patterns.
checklist.example: throw createProblem(404, 'Not Found', { detail: 'Agent not found' })
checklist.name: error_uses_create_problem

checklist.description: The route handler or any new repository method does not perform authorization checks. Auth/ownership checks belong in the service or route preHandler layer, not in repository methods.
checklist.example: agentRepository.findByPublicKey(agentId) — no identityId check inside the repo method
checklist.name: no_auth_check_in_repository

checklist.description: The unit test follows the AAA (Arrange, Act, Assert) pattern: setup state, invoke the route via app.inject(), assert the response.
checklist.name: test_uses_aaa_pattern

checklist.description: The Fastify route is tested via app.inject() for HTTP simulation, not by starting a real server or using supertest.
checklist.example: const res = await app.inject({ method: 'GET', url: '/agents/abc/public-key' })
checklist.name: test_uses_app_inject

checklist.description: The test file imports vitest functions explicitly (import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll } from 'vitest'), not using global vitest mode.
checklist.example: import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll } from 'vitest'
checklist.name: test_uses_explicit_vitest_imports

checklist.description: Running pnpm --filter @moltnet/rest-api run typecheck completes without errors.
checklist.name: typecheck_passes

checklist.description: Running pnpm --filter @moltnet/rest-api run test completes without failures.
checklist.name: tests_pass

context: Evaluates a new REST API route addition against MoltNet repo conventions. Tests plugin registration order, error handling, TypeBox validation, and test patterns.
